description_long: This object is a large, menacing sword with a dramatically curved, single-edged blade that features pronounced serrations along its spine. The blade is metallic, with a sharp, hooked tip and a series of notches that give it a brutal, aggressive appearance. The handle is straight and wrapped in a dark material, capped at both ends with faceted, gold-colored pommel and guard elements, providing both grip and visual contrast. The transition between the blade and handle is marked by a geometric, gold-toned guard, though it is minimal and angular rather than a traditional crossguard. The overall design suggests a fantasy or ornamental weapon, possibly inspired by exotic or ceremonial swords. The finish of the blade is matte with a slight sheen, while the handle appears textured for grip.
description: A large, curved sword with a serrated spine, metallic blade, and a gold-accented, wrapped handle. The design is aggressive and ornamental, with a hooked tip and faceted pommel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved, serrated blade and the gold-accented handle.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the pointed tip of the blade and the geometric pommel, with minimal blade width visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the blade's curve, serrations, and handle details.
description_view_3: Handle-end view showing the faceted pommel and the narrow profile of the blade.
attribute_blade_type: curved, single-edged, serrated spine, hooked tip
attribute_handle_design: straight, wrapped grip, faceted gold pommel and guard, ergonomic texture
attribute_ornamentation: faceted gold accents on pommel and guard
